name: pantry-chan
description: A react app, to manage pantry inventory and cooking recipes

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm:docker:up:db" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.db:backup: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec pantry_backend npm run db:backup
scripts.db:restore: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec pantry_backend npm run db:restore --
